validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.confirmPasswordMin: Password confirmation must be at least 6 characters
validation.fullNameMin: Full name must be at least 2 characters

toast.termsRequired: You must accept the agreement and privacy terms to register.
toast.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered
toast.signUpSuccessCarOwner: Registered as a car owner! You can now add your vehicle.
toast.signUpSuccessRenter: Registration successful! You can now rent cars.
toast.signUpVerifyEmail: Account created. Please verify your email address.
toast.emailConfirmed: Your email has been verified. You can sign in now.
toast.redirectNotAllowed: Verification link could not be configured. Please try again later.
toast.emailRateLimit: Too many email requests. Please wait a few minutes.
toast.emailNotConfirmed: You can sign in after verifying your email address.
toast.resendEmailRequired: Enter your email address to resend the verification email.
toast.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email sent again. Check your inbox and spam folder.
toast.alreadyRegisteredResend: This email is already registered. Verification email sent again.
toast.emailAlreadyConfirmed: This email is already verified. Try signing in.
toast.verificationUserNotFound: No account found for this email. Sign up first.
toast.verificationSendFailed: Could not send verification email. Try again in a few minutes.
toast.magicLinkSent: A sign-in link was sent to your email. Check inbox and spam.
toast.signUpVerifyEmailCheckResend: Account created. If no email arrives, use resend below.
toast.verificationUncertain: Request sent, but email may not arrive. Check spam; Supabase email setup may be required.
toast.verificationServiceUnavailable: Verification mail service is not active. Admin must configure Supabase SMTP/Resend or disable email confirmation.

auth.emailVerifiedBanner: Your email has been verified. You can sign in now.

resendVerification.title: Didn't get the verification email?
resendVerification.hint: Enter the email you registered with and we'll send the verification link again.
resendVerification.troubleshoot: If no email arrives: check spam. Still nothing? In Supabase → Authentication → Providers → Email, disable Confirm email or add SMTP (Resend).

signUp.renterDesc: I want to rent a car
signUp.carOwnerDesc: I want to list my car
signUp.termsAccept: I accept the <rentalLink>Rental Agreement</rentalLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
signUp.carOwnerHint: Register as a car owner to list your vehicle on the platform and earn income.

identity.notCompleted: Verification was not completed. Please try the steps again.
identity.verifiedDesc: Identity, liveness, and license verification are complete. You can use the car rental service.
identity.reVerifyHint: You are re-verifying your identity. New card details will overwrite the existing record.
identity.licensePending: Identity and liveness are complete. Enter your license number to finish verification.
identity.stepsHint: Complete ID card NFC, liveness check, and license number steps in order.

autoLicense.title: Automatic License Verification
autoLicense.description: In order: ID card NFC → liveness → license number.
autoLicense.storedDatesHint: Previously saved dates will be used — check the serial number and scan the card.
autoLicense.firstTimeDatesHint: MRZ dates are required on first verification; saved once and not asked again.
autoLicense.docNumberHelp: Serial number on the front of the card — no spaces, uppercase.
autoLicense.nfcScanning: Hold your ID card near your phone…
autoLicense.nfcUnsupported: NFC is not supported on this device.
autoLicense.nfcIdleHint: Enter your details, then scan your ID card.
autoLicense.livenessIdleHint: Starts automatically after ID is read.
autoLicense.licenseFinalHint: Final step: enter your license number and submit verification.
autoLicense.licenseNumberHelp: Enter the number on the front of your license
autoLicense.driverScoreHint: Every driver starts at 100 points. Your score updates based on usage.

toast.docNumberRequiredDesc: Enter your ID card serial number.
toast.datesRequiredDesc: On first scan, also enter birth and expiry dates (saved once).
toast.cameraPermissionRequired: Camera permission required. Grant it in Settings.
toast.identityRequiredForLiveness: Scan your ID card before the liveness step.
toast.cameraPermissionDesc: Grant camera permission for the liveness check.
toast.signInRequiredDesc: You must sign in to verify your license.
toast.verifyErrorGeneric: An error occurred during license verification

liveness.title: Liveness Check
liveness.description: Align your face in the frame — verification completes when detected.
liveness.autoDetectFailed: Auto detection failed. Confirm with the button below or try again.
liveness.alignFaceNative: Align your face in the frame
liveness.alignFaceBlaze: Align your face in the frame (auto-confirms when detected)
liveness.cameraDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable camera access for Rideyo in Settings.

nfcPrompt.title: NFC Identity Verification
nfcPrompt.description: NFC identity verification is required after sign-in for secure rentals.
nfcPrompt.hint: Verify Now will take you to the NFC verification page.

driverHistory.title: Driver History Check
driverHistory.description: We need to verify your driver information for safe rentals
driverHistory.penaltyExceeded: Penalty points exceed the allowed maximum
driverHistory.note: Note: For safe rentals, license penalty points must be at or below {{max}}. Driver score must be at least 60.

toast.signInRequiredDesc: You must sign in to save driver information.
toast.duplicateDesc: A record already exists for this user. Refresh the page and try again.
toast.permissionErrorDesc: Operation failed due to database permissions (RLS). Check Supabase policy settings.

messages.penaltyExceeded: Your license penalty points ({{points}}) exceed the allowed maximum ({{max}}).
messages.accidentsBlocked: Rentals are not available due to your accident history.
messages.scoreTooLow: Your driver score ({{score}}) is not sufficient for rental (minimum 60).
messages.incomplete: Driver verification could not be completed.

driverScore.title: My Driver Score
driverScore.updateSubtitle: Your score updates based on usage
driverScore.baselineHint: Your score updates based on how you use vehicles.
driverScore.eligibleDesc: Your driver score is at a sufficient level

profile.identitySectionDesc: Your identity verification status for secure rentals.
profile.packagesDesc: Manage your subscription packages on a separate page.
profile.quickActionsDesc: Go to frequently used pages with one tap.
